sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data JSON, score INT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, score, created_at) VALUES (1, json '[1, 2, NULL]', 10, NOW());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, score, created_at) VALUES (2, json '[3, 4, 5]', 20, NOW());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, score, created_at) VALUES (3, json '[NULL, NULL]', NULL, NOW());
SELECT id, json.text(data) as text_data, score * 2 AS score_doubled FROM test_table WHERE score IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, json.text(data), ~COALESCE(score, 0) AS inverted_score FROM (SELECT id, data, score FROM test_table WHERE created_at > (NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY')) as sub_query;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE json.text(data) ~ 'NULL';
SELECT id, json.text(data) || ' has score ' || score AS message FROM test_table WHERE score BETWEEN 5 AND 25;
SELECT *, json.text(data) FROM test_table WHERE (score IS NOT NULL) AND (score > (SELECT AVG(score) FROM test_table));
SELECT id, ~100 AS negation_value, json.text(data) FROM test_table GROUP BY id, data HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
